description: Legal deed. In Hebrew. Location: Cairo (מצרים). Dated: Tuesday, 2 Heshvan 5324 AM = 19 October 1563 CE. Doña Masʿūda (the same Doña Masʿūda as in Moss. VII,41.1?), the widow of Avraham b. Ẓahal, leases her ʿaliya apartment that is on top of the synagogue (בית הכנסת המדרש) to Avraham Baronito for a period of 5 months. Rent: 5 medins/month.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
